name: 40W/80W/120W Selectable Full Cut Off Wall Pack With Built In Photocell
description: ZION LED USA Wattage-Selectable Wall Pack Light Experience flexible, efficient outdoor lighting with ZION LED USA’s wattage-selectable wall pack. Designed to deliver performance and versatility, this fixture allows you to choose from 40W, 80W, or 120W settings to match your project’s unique needs. A built-in photocell ensures dusk-to-dawn automation , while the full cut-off design reduces light pollution without compromising brightness.
short_desc: Key Features: Tunable Wattage: Easily switch between 40W, 80W, or 120W outputs for tailored energy use and optimal brightness. 5000K Daylight Color Temperature: Provides crisp, clear illumination for improved visibility and safety. Modern Bronze Finish: A sleek, durable finish complements a wide range of architectural styles. Type II Light Distribution: Offers wide and even coverage with minimal glare—ideal for pathways and perimeters. IP65 Rated: Engineered for outdoor durability with protection against dust, rain, and harsh environments. Integrated Photocell: Enables automatic dusk-to-dawn operation , reducing energy waste and maintenance. Recommended Applications: Commercial Properties: Illuminate exteriors, parking areas, and entrances of offices, hotels, and retail buildings. Residential Spaces: Enhance home security and curb appeal around driveways, porches, and gardens. Industrial Facilities: Provide bright, efficient lighting for loading docks, yards, and warehouses. Public Areas: Perfect for lighting parks, plazas, and recreational zones with safe, glare-controlled illumination.
